note: M12d (F5) — projection distance primitive. reference_model.point_to_dist (R_PointToDist): view->point distance sqrt(dx2+dy2) without a sqrt -- octant fold (dx>=dy), tantoangle index by FixedDiv(dy,dx)>>DBITS(5), dist=FixedDiv(dx, finesine[angle+ANG90]=cos(angle)). Reuses tantoangle (M12b) + finesine + fixed_div (R6). 16.16. Foundation for the wall perpendicular distance rw_distance (M12e -> R_ScaleFromGlobalAngle).
accuracy: axis-aligned EXACT (cos0=1); 45deg within finesine quantization (diff 10 / 0.0001%); <=0.2% off-axis
